creator: ccowart@timesinks.net
text:
This is a duplicate of ports/149345. However, the patch was made against
a more current version of the port (I didn't realize things had been
bumped for some apr refactoring), so I approve this change and recommend
that ports/149345 be closed.

Thanks!

-- 
Chris Cowart
  http://www.timesinks.net/
